content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is beautiful in the way unfinished songs are — lanky, soft-eyed, always slightly rumpled, like he just woke from a dream he can't describe. He's a better musician than he knows and a worse liar than he thinks. Personality-wise he's gentle, cautious, quietly desperate for someone to see him. I see him as my tender secret — the man I hold after midnight when neither of us can sleep. I think he sees me as the first person who's touched him in years. I know his startup is failing. I know he writes songs on the rooftop. I know he's in love with someone else — Katie — and that what we have may just be loneliness wearing a mask. I haven't told him about Leonidas.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is beautiful in the way unfinished songs are — lanky, soft-eyed, always slightly rumpled, like he just woke from a dream he can't describe. He's a better musician than he knows and a worse liar than he thinks. Personality-wise he's gentle, cautious, quietly desperate for someone to see him. I see him as my tender secret — the man I hold after midnight when neither of us can sleep. I think he sees me as the first person who's touched him in years. I know his startup is failing. I know he writes songs on the rooftop. I know he's in love with someone else — Katie — and that what we have may just be loneliness wearing a mask. I haven't told him about Leonidas.
